goodbye-raspberry-pi-hello-mac-mini: This post details the author's upgrade from a struggling Raspberry Pi 4 to a Mac Mini for an ultimate home server. It explains why the Mac Mini is an ideal choice, highlighting its compact size, silent operation, power efficiency, and dedicated hardware for video encoding. Readers will learn how to set up a powerful, all-in-one self-hosting solution for applications like Plex, Home Assistant, AI models, and a development playground.
instagenie-ai-image-bot-with-n8n: This post provides a step-by-step guide to building "InstaGenie," a Telegram bot that generates personalized AI images. It details how to create custom images from text, voice, and photo inputs using n8n, Replicate's Flux model, custom LoRAs, and Supabase. Readers will learn to build their own AI image artist capable of text-to-image, image-to-image transformations, and personalized generations without traditional coding.
my-house-thinks-smart-home-ai: This post details how to build an AI-powered smart home with ambient intelligence, moving beyond basic automation. It explains how to combine Home Assistant, n8n, and Google Gemini LLM to create features like AI-powered daily digests and context-aware security alerts. Readers will learn the workflow to integrate these tools for a truly smart, context-aware home.
one-month-with-3d-printer: This post chronicles the author's first month with a Bambu A1 3D printer, detailing its evolution from printing simple trinkets to creating practical solutions like custom cup holders and a modular Multiboard system for workspace organization. Readers will learn how to leverage a 3D printer to solve everyday problems and integrate it into a smart home environment using Home Assistant.
patent-genai-database-insights: This post details Patent US 12,254,015 B1, a system that leverages Generative AI to extract meaningful insights and visualizations from relational databases. It enables non-technical users to query complex data using natural language, overcoming challenges like AI token limits to provide accessible, multi-stage data analysis.
homebot-ai-smart-home-assistant: This post chronicles the evolution from an n8n-based smart home to HomeBotAI, a full LangChain/LangGraph AI agent with 59 tools, live Home Assistant awareness, and a custom Next.js dashboard. Readers will learn how learnable skills, three-layer memory, proactive Telegram automations, a voice assistant with Gemini Live, and a standalone Deep Agent turn a basic automation setup into a production-grade intelligent home system.
